response.step_by_step_log:
1. Scanned video for song text: Found "M@GICAL☆CURE! LOVE SHOT!" at 00:00 and "炎夏" at 02:52.
2. Searched for "M@GICAL☆CURE! LOVE SHOT!" using "SAWTOWNE Hatsune Miku Japanese and English lyrics".
3. Searched for "炎夏" (Enka) using "Anya Melfissa 炎夏 Japanese and English lyrics".
4. Extracted lyrics and metadata from reliable sources (Genius, Vocaloid Wiki, Uta-net).
5. Compiled all information into the required JSON structure.
response.global_summary: The video consists of two musical performances: a collaborative duet, followed by a solo performance by Anya Melfissa, with a brief comic scene in between.

scenes.description: A duet performance on a virtual stage. The song "M@GICAL☆CURE! LOVE SHOT!" is sung by Anya Melfissa and Hatsune Miku. Text "M@GICAL☆CURE! LOVE SHOT!" appears at 00:00.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
やあみんな！
私は初音ミク、バーチャルアイドルだよ！
まぁ、そんなの当然じゃんって思うよね…。
でも私って実は― (うりゃおい! うりゃおい!)
朝のコールで目を覚まして
フリルの衣装に袖を通して
さあ、目を開けて一日を始めよう
夜明けまで戦って
全ての悪を倒すまで、わっ！
ドジって転んでお尻を打って
魔法のスマホと
おバカな着信音で
呪文を唱えて世界を直すの
どんな代償を払っても
止める理由なんてない
私たちが愛する世界のために(TSKR!)
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Hello everyone!
I'm Hatsune Miku, a virtual idol!
Well, that's what everyone seems to think, but secretly, I'm- (hehe)
(Urya oi! Urya oi!)
I wake up to a call
Put my frilly outfit on now
It's time I open up my eyes and start the day
I combat till the dawn
Until every villain's gone, wah!
A clumsy trip and now I've fallen to my butt
With my magical phone
And a silly little ringtone
I'll shout a magic word and set the world in place
Whatever it may cost
There's no reason to stop
For a world that I cherish and love (TSKR!)

scenes.description: A solo performance on a virtual stage. The song "Enka" (炎夏) is sung by Anya Melfissa. Text "炎夏" appears at 02:52.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
知った、救いのない形だった僕の聲は
散った、狂いのない赤い血が流れているんだ
ただただ襲い来る影ばかり満ちて
抗う言葉も、立ち上がれない夜風
赤く光る場所へ、走り出したら
ただ膝を抱えている君がいた
だからENCOUNT、悲劇、決まった、天国へ
不甲斐ない瞳きっとあの日、見つめた
君のせいは、早く、早く、早く、早く…
身を揺らして
淡い、淡い、水面の向こうと
ぼう線と、してるその顔に触れて
見たかった
だからENCOUNT、悲劇、決まった、天国へ
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Understood, it was a form without salvation, my voice.
Scattered, the unclouded red blood is flowing.
Only shadows are filling, coming to attack me.
Facing the words I can't resist, the wind that won't lift.
I left with the hope of escaping to a place that shines red.
I'm just holding my knees, you were there.
That's why an encounter, a tragedy, decided, to heaven.
Eyes that don't reflect, surely that day, I was staring at them.
The days that followed, hurry, hurry, hurry, hurry...
Shaking my body.
Faint, faint, in the water's reflection too.
Looked, looked at that face, that touches, wanted to see.
That's why an encounter, a tragedy, decided, to heaven.
